title: Country-wide campaign filters fan out to thousands of locations
summary: A campaign's filter.mode of 'all' or 'cities_only' over a whole country expands to every city/postcode — one (country: DE, mode: all) campaign fanned to 1,733 locations and dispatched 113 worker jobs in 23 seconds. Check the location count before submitting; narrow with regions/population/custom.
references: Flows Phase 2 incident: (country: DE) campaign → 1,733 locations / 113 jobs / 23s
